title: atelophragma altum
intro: Atelophragma altum is a type of plant, also known as the "Monkey's Comb" or "Monkey Comb", native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Atelophragma altum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, and its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Atelophragma altum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
